title: Awakening from the Meaning Crisis — Ep. 3
subtitle: Continuous Cosmos, the Two Worlds Mythology, and the Modern Mismatch

nodes.label: Continuous Cosmos
nodes.summary: the ancient unified world of cycles, power, and fitting in

nodes.label: Two-World Mythology
nodes.summary: the Axial split of reality into two distinct realms

nodes.label: The Everyday World
nodes.summary: the realm of illusion, flaw, and appearance

nodes.label: The Real World
nodes.summary: the realm of truth, flawlessness, and ultimate meaning

nodes.label: The Pilgrim
nodes.summary: the seeker of self-transcendence cutting through illusion

nodes.label: Scientific Worldview
nodes.summary: collapses the Two Worlds, returning us to a flat continuous cosmos

nodes.label: The Modern Mismatch
nodes.summary: using Axial grammar in a world where the 'Real World' ceiling has collapsed

annotations.text: We are trapped using the meaning-making grammar of the Two Worlds to navigate a flattened cosmos.
